title: Implement rebuild engine for transaction state
summary: Implement deterministic rebuild of materialized transaction state from the transaction event log, including semantic memory reconstruction.
outputs: Updated state rebuild logic for transaction-aware state
Deterministic rebuild behavior with integrity validation
Semantic memory reconstruction from event log
acceptance_criteria: Rebuild logic replays transaction events into the 0.4.0 materialized state schema.
Integrity checks detect mismatches and trigger deterministic rebuild precedence.
Torn-state recovery behavior is deterministic and documented in code comments.
Rebuild output includes last_applied_seq and next_action derivation.
semantic_summary and user_intent are reconstructed deterministically from events.

steps.description: Update replay pipeline to apply tx events into materialized transaction state.
Implement integrity validation and torn-state precedence during rebuild.
Derive next_action deterministically from status, steps, file intents, and semantic memory.
Reconstruct semantic_summary and user_intent from event log during replay.

notes: Align with Phase 2 rebuild-engine specification and semantic memory rationale.
Keep behavior deterministic for identical event sequences.
